title: RabbitMQ Administrative User Lifecycle Audit
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder file monitor; export definitions nightly for diff-based corroboration
spl:
index=messaging sourcetype="rabbitmq:log"
| search ("Adding user" OR "Deleting user" OR "user '" OR "Setting permissions" OR "Clearing permissions" OR "administrator")
| table _time, host, _raw
description: Captures creation, deletion, and permission mutations for RabbitMQ identities—required evidence for access-governance programs.
value: Demonstrates that only approved admins changed messaging credentials and speeds investigations when new privileged tags appear.
implementation: Enable verbose management logging where safe. Ship logs to a restricted index. Join against ITSM tickets for automated compliance dashboards.
visualization: Table (admin actions), Timeline (user lifecycle), Single value (changes per week).
grandmaExplanation: We record when accounts on the messaging system are created or given extra powers, so audits can prove who did what.
